channel.title: MCP Radar — new MCP servers
channel.description: New and trending Model Context Protocol servers, auto-discovered from GitHub daily.

item.title: AIPAYagent/aipay-protocol
item.description: Agent-native verifiable USDC escrow protocol for AI agents. Smart contracts, SDKs, MCP server, verifiers, operator, and web console. — ⭐16, TypeScript

item.title: tk-fantasy/fantasy
item.description: AI smart home assistant for Home Assistant: LangGraph agent + MCP tools + RAG knowledge graph + vision perception — ⭐11, Python

item.title: dpmadsen/multimodels-mcp
item.description: MCP server that lets Claude Code delegate tasks to GPT-5.6 (Codex CLI), DeepSeek, GLM, OpenRouter and local LM Studio models — plus a 198-run benchmark of all of them — ⭐9, JavaScript

item.title: Trainspotting31/memory-buddy
item.description: Shared memory layer for AI agents. Deploy once, connect Hermes/Trae/Cursor/Claude Desktop via MCP - they all share one memory. $0/month on Cloudflare free tier. — ⭐8, TypeScript

item.title: masteryee-labs/Open-Godot-MCP
item.description: Open-source MCP server for AI-autonomous Godot game development. Deterministic playtesting, multiplayer testing, DAP debugging, LSP, token-efficient. 100% MIT. — ⭐6, Python

item.title: cuongnbms/mastering-claude-code
item.description: Cẩm nang thực chiến Mastering Claude Code (tiếng Việt): 16 chương biên soạn từ tài liệu chính thức của Anthropic — CLI, workflows, MCP, subagents, skills, hooks, plugins, CI/CD & tối ưu context. — ⭐5, n/a

item.title: Ivinco/gocd-mcp
item.description: Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for GoCD, with per-user access-token auth — ⭐5, Go

item.title: frangelbarrera/code-review-agent-mcp
item.description: AI code review agent MCP server. Reviews code like a kernel maintainer: blunt, technical, no sugarcoating. Detects bugs + OWASP Top 10 security vulnerabilities. 4 harshness levels. Anti-RLHF. — ⭐4, Python

item.title: mtbun/storeshots-mcp
item.description: Store-ready App Store & Google Play screenshots from any MCP client. Device frames, benefit-driven headlines, exact store dimensions. No API keys. — ⭐4, TypeScript

item.title: lm060719/reconbridge
item.description: 通用逆向分析 KernelSU 模块：手机侧只做原子能力，智能全在 PC 侧（Claude Code + MCP）。仅限授权安全研究与教育用途。 — ⭐4, Python

item.title: JinyangWang27/people-context
item.description: Local-first memory for the people in your life—an MCP server and CLI that gives AI agents durable identity, relationship, and communication context. — ⭐4, Python

item.title: photoshootapp/photoshoot-ai-design
item.description: Official Photoshoot.app MCP server. Generate studio-quality AI product photos, photoshoot ideas, and commercial visuals directly from Claude, Cursor, Codex, and MCP clients. — ⭐3, TypeScript

item.title: Umairkhan2324/trilith
item.description: Trilith v0.1 beta — context engineering for agents (budgeted memory, 3 tiers, audit trail). Core is Python; use via REST or adapters (LangGraph / OpenAI Agents / Claude / TS). Needs trilith serve loca — ⭐3, Python

item.title: v0id-byte/ragkernel
item.description: A verifiable engineering knowledge engine that turns technical documents, CAD models, and equipment data into structured knowledge for humans and AI agents. — ⭐3, Python

item.title: Hyper-Solutions/hypersolutions-claude-code
item.description: Claude Code plugin for the Hyper Solutions anti-bot API: integrate and debug request-based scrapers for Akamai, Incapsula, DataDome, and Kasada, with live request-capture (powhttp) and HAR-analysis MC — ⭐3, Python

item.title: BeppeTemp/cartographer
item.description: MCP governance server in Go for the Agentic Wiki — knowledge that composes, not that you query — ⭐3, Go

item.title: shigella520/MindTrain
item.description: AI-driven knowledge training platform with pluggable schedulers, Codex Skill integration, and optional Anki/FSRS support. — ⭐3, Java

item.title: Kota-Karthik/secure-actions
item.description: MCP server for secure AI agent authentication — lets Claude, Claude Code, and other LLM agents call APIs without exposing raw tokens or credentials to the model — ⭐3, Go

item.title: Coraje187/genesis-grid
item.description: Local AI assistant client with advanced Settings, MCP Server Management, and a secure Telegram Bot Bridge. — ⭐3, TypeScript

item.title: abcubed3/okf
item.description: The OKF-go provides a high-performance suite of utilities to validate bundles, harvest metadata from databases and APIs, assemble context for Large Language Models (LLMs), and run an MCP Server. — ⭐3, Go

item.title: 0xsline/OpenChatCut
item.description: Local-first conversational AI video editor with a professional multi-track timeline, Agent Skills, MCP integration, and Remotion-powered rendering. — ⭐130, TypeScript

item.title: EndymionLee/PilotBrowseMCP
item.description: A browser runtime that lets AI agents control your real Chrome browser via MCP. Agents can explore websites, generate operation manuals, and reuse them to save tokens. AI操控你的真实浏览器。 — ⭐50, TypeScript

item.title: bilieebiliee1-design/SOMCP
item.description: Android-native SO reverse engineering MCP server — ⭐28, Kotlin

item.title: EMahmoudNabil/slnmap
item.description: A local knowledge graph + MCP server that gives AI coding agents a map of your .NET codebase — ⭐7, C#

item.title: Adr1an04/erga-mcp
item.description: Organize and track job applications and tailor LaTeX resumes from the CLI or an MCP client. — ⭐7, Python

item.title: prahaladuk2208-arch/geeflow
item.description: MCP server that lets Claude run Google Earth Engine — ⭐7, Python

item.title: northXD/nxrth
item.description: Native C++ Growtopia mbot client with ltoken login, geiger support + auto geiger, MCP Server. — ⭐6, C++

item.title: gondola-ai/gondola-mcp
item.description: Cash-vs-award travel search MCP — hotels, flights, and rental cars across every major loyalty program, with cents-per-point valuations, loyalty tracking, and direct booking. — ⭐6, Dockerfile

item.title: ltxzs/claude-subagent-mcp
item.description: 通过mcp的形式在Codex中调用claude code CLI实现claude负责实现代码,Codex负责审查代码.Local stdio MCP server that delegates implementation tasks to Claude Code for Codex review workflows. — ⭐4, JavaScript

item.title: Enoch666/suanming-mcp
item.description: 玄机阁算命 MCP Server — 八字排盘、六爻起卦、灵签抽签、姓名打分、起名、程序员黄历。传统中国风水墨 HTML 命理报告。 — ⭐3, TypeScript
